questions.question:
Should this task migrate all existing Relay IPC methods to the Rpc/RpcGroup layer, or establish the new pattern with one representative vertical slice first?

Why it matters: This determines whether the implementation ticket is a broad boundary migration or a smaller architecture slice with follow-up work.
Recommended answer: Establish the Rpc/RpcGroup pattern with one representative method group first, keep all existing behavior compatible, and document the migration path for the remaining methods.
questions.answer: rewrite the existing to Rpc and RpcGroup

questions.question:
Which method area should be the first representative slice: tickets, projects, runs, or repository chat?

Why it matters: A concrete slice lets the ticket specify affected files, acceptance criteria, and regression tests without leaving the agent to choose a risky migration target.
Recommended answer: Use a low-to-moderate-risk ticket/project read path as the first slice, because it exercises request/response schemas without immediately coupling the task to streaming run orchestration.
questions.answer: all should be refactored to an approach that fits cleanly on top of existing rpc layer
